adrs.title: Canonical registry is a single JSON document
Features are the targetable units
Issues are plannable work items
Entity-centric registry with a derived graph export
Normalized prefixed IDs
Claim status and claim tier are orthogonal
Feature implementation state is separate from lifecycle state
Immutable boundary and release snapshots
Fail-closed guards
Generated projections are non-canonical
Explicit schema versioning
Portable core with repo-specific evidence generation outside the core
ADR-0001: monorepo and package topology
ADR-0002: extension runtime and manifest
ADR-0003: renderer/editor package split
ADR-0004: theme token and class contract
ADR-0005: extension distribution model
ADR-0006: release, versioning, and conformance
ADR-0007: Markdown target freeze and certification boundary
ADR-0008: release-train groups and compatibility baselines
ADR-0009 — renderer CommonMark-core Phase 2 checkpoint
ADR-0010 — default GFM profile Phase 3 checkpoint
ADR-0011: Optional profile boundary Phase 4 checkpoint
ADR-0012 — editor semantics and authoring UX Phase 5 checkpoint
ADR-0013 — preview, export, and render-policy Phase 6 checkpoint
ADR-0014: Shell parity Phase 7 checkpoint
ADR-0015 — Phase 8 settings, data, session, and Git parity checkpoint
ADR-0016 — Phase 9 theme inventory, token contract, and visual parity checkpoint
ADR-0017 — Phase 10 i18n, language UX, and catalog coverage checkpoint
ADR-0018 — Phase 11 package documentation, examples, contract boundaries, and evidence checkpoint
ADR-0019 — strict conformance closure suite Phase 12 checkpoint
ADR-0020 — RC freeze, versioning, and promotion prep (Phase 13 checkpoint)
ADR-0021 — promotion and release Phase 14 checkpoint
ADR-0022 — Phase 15 post-release stabilization and support-window checkpoint
ADR-0023 — Certification before promotion (Phase 16 checkpoint)
ADR-0024 — Gate B certification-closure rerun checkpoint
ADR-0025 — Gate B certification-closure continuation Phase 18 checkpoint
ADR-0026: Gate B certification-closure continuation (Phase 19 checkpoint)
ADR-0027: Gate B certification-closure rerun (Phase 20 checkpoint)
